$comment: Recommended Claude Code permissions for projects that use ClaudeAgents (the /gan skill). Copy or merge this into <project>/.claude/settings.json (per-project) or ~/.claude/settings.json (per-user) to suppress Claude Code permission prompts during /gan runs. The allowlist is intentionally conservative — it covers the operations the /gan agent loop performs in a typical sprint and nothing else. Destructive commands (rm -rf, git push --force, etc.) are NOT in the allowlist; they will still prompt. Tighten or extend per project: see https://docs.claude.com/en/docs/claude-code/settings or run the fewer-permission-prompts skill against an existing /gan transcript to generate a tailored allowlist.
